title: ceraia pseudocalceola
intro: Ceraia pseudocalceola, also known as False Coral Tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae, native to tropical regions. The plant's bark and roots have been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ceraia pseudocalceola include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. In herbal preparations, Ceraia pseudocalceola is often used in decoctions, infusions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
